steps.title: Identify the significance
steps.content: The fossil matters because it combines land-dwelling traits, such as four legs, with pinniped traits, such as a seal's skull and teeth. That combination shows a transitional stage in pinniped evolution.

steps.title: Reject incomplete choices
steps.content: A mentions seal features but not the evolutionary transition. B is vague about what the fossil resembles. D only says the fossil is transitional without explaining the features or significance. The answer is C.
